facts.statement: Transformer-based architectures now dominate NLP benchmarks, with models like GPT-4 and Claude setting new state-of-the-art results.
facts.source_title: 2026 State of AI: Transformer Models Lead the Pack

facts.statement: Agentic AI systems using multi-step tool calling are being adopted rapidly in enterprise automation workflows.
facts.source_title: Enterprise AI: Agents Take Over Automation
